_meta._comment: Ground truth between natural language sentences and constraint rules in Constant Denial Constraint notation

_sentences: This data element is required for all assets.
This data element is required for all assets.
_constraint: f1."Real Property Type Code" IS NULL

_sentences: Real Property Type indicates the asset is one of the following categories of real property (valid codes are in parentheses):
Real Property Type indicates the asset is one of the following categories of real property (valid codes are in parentheses):
_constraint: f1."Real Property Type Code" NOT IN (20, 35, 40)

_sentences: Real Property Type indicates the asset is one of the following categories of real property (valid codes are in parentheses):
_constraint: f1."Real Property Type" = f2."Real Property Type"
f1."Real Property Type Code" != f2."Real Property Type Code"

_sentences: Real Property Type indicates the asset is one of the following categories of real property (valid codes are in parentheses):
_constraint: f1."Real Property Type" != f2."Real Property Type"
f1."Real Property Type Code" = f2."Real Property Type Code"

_sentences: This data element is required for all assets.
This data element is required for all assets.
_constraint: f1."Real Property Use Code" IS NULL

_sentences: Real Property Use indicates the asset’s predominant use in one of the following categories:
mapping._comment: Page 11. Land codes in section G (page 69)
_constraint: f1."Real Property Use" NOT IN ('Agriculture', 'Grazing', 'Forest and Wildlife', 'Parks and Historic Sites', 'Wilderness Areas', 'Office Building Locations', 'Miscellaneous Military Land', 'Airfields', 'Harbors and Ports', 'Post Offices', 'Power Development and Distribution', 'Reclamation and Irrigation', 'Outpatient Healthcare', 'Flood Control and Navigation', 'Vacant', 'Institutional', 'Housing', 'Storage', 'Industrial', 'Space Exploration', 'Research and Development', 'Communication Systems', 'Navigation and Traffic Aids', 'All Other', 'Training Land')

_sentences: Real Property Use indicates the asset’s predominant use in one of the following categories:
mapping._comment: Page 11. Building codes in section G (page 69)
_constraint: f1."Real Property Use" NOT IN ('Office', 'Post Office', 'Outpatient Healthcare Facility', 'Hospital', 'Prisons and Detention Centers', 'School', 'Comfort Station/Restrooms', 'Data Center', 'Courthouse', 'Museum', 'Other Institutional Uses', 'Family Housing', 'Dormitories/Barracks', 'Warehouses', 'Industrial', 'Service', 'Communication Systems', 'Navigation and Traffic Aids', 'Laboratories', 'All Other', 'Border/ Inspection Station', 'Facility Security', 'Land Port of Entry', 'Aviation Security Related', 'Public Facing Facility', 'Child Care Center')

_sentences: Real Property Use indicates the asset’s predominant use in one of the following categories:
mapping._comment: Page 11. Structure codes in section G (page 69)
_constraint: f1."Real Property Use" NOT IN ('Airfield Pavements', 'Harbors and Ports', 'Power Development and Distribution', 'Reclamation and Irrigation', 'Flood Control and Navigation', 'Museum', 'Storage (other than buildings)', 'Industrial (other than buildings)', 'Service (other than buildings)', 'Space Exploration Structures', 'Parking Structures', 'Research and Development (other than laboratories)', 'Utility Systems', 'Communication Systems', 'Navigation and Traffic Aids (other than buildings)', 'Recreational (other than buildings)', 'Roads and Bridges', 'Railroads', 'Monuments and Memorials', 'Miscellaneous Military Facilities', 'All Other', 'Weapons Ranges', 'Renewable Energy System')

_sentences: Real Property Use indicates the asset’s predominant use in one of the following categories:
mapping._comment: Page 11. Real Property Use -> Real Property Use Code
_constraint: f1."Real Property Use" = f2."Real Property Use"
f1."Real Property Use Code" != f2."Real Property Use Code"

_sentences: Real Property Use indicates the asset’s predominant use in one of the following categories:
mapping._comment: Page 11. Real Property Use Code -> Real Property Use AND Real Property Type = 20
_constraint: f1."Real Property Use" != f2."Real Property Use"
f1."Real Property Use Code" = f2."Real Property Use Code"

_sentences: Real Property Use indicates the asset’s predominant use in one of the following categories:
mapping._comment: Page 11. Real Property Use Code -> Real Property Use AND Real Property Type = 35
_constraint: f1."Real Property Use" != f2."Real Property Use"
f1."Real Property Use Code" = f2."Real Property Use Code"

_sentences: Real Property Use indicates the asset’s predominant use in one of the following categories:
mapping._comment: Page 11. Real Property Use Code -> Real Property Use AND Real Property Type = 40
_constraint: f1."Real Property Use" != f2."Real Property Use"
f1."Real Property Use Code" = f2."Real Property Use Code"

_sentences: This data element is required for all non-disposed office building assets.
_constraint: f1."Real Property Use" IN ('Office', 'Office Building Locations')

_sentences: This data element is required for all non-disposed office building assets.
_constraint: f1."Real Property Use" IN ('Office', 'Office Building Locations')

_sentences: This data element is required for all non-disposed office building assets.
It is not to be reported for any other assets.
_constraint: f1."Real Property Use" NOT IN ('Office', 'Office Building Locations')

_sentences: This data element is required for all non-disposed office building assets.
It is not to be reported for any other assets.
_constraint: f1."Field Office Code" IS NOT NULL
f1."Real Property Use" NOT IN ('Office', 'Office Building Locations')
f1."Field Office" NOT IN ('Headquarters', 'Headquarters Function', 'Field Office')

mapping._comment: Page 11. Field Office -> Field Office Code
_constraint: f1."Field Office Code" != f2."Field Office Code"

mapping._comment: Page 11. Field Office Code -> Field Office
_constraint: f1."Field Office Code" = f2."Field Office Code"
